behavior_summary: U8P_ANCTONES::hatch (Event 7) is a trigger that runs when an actor (typically the Avatar) enters the Ancient Ones' fast/trigger area. It marks the triggering actor with script info/process-exclude, scans nearby tokens/items to decide whether the encounter should proceed, and then either launches the main Ancient Ones interaction (U8P_ANCTONES::0116) or schedules a cleanup (external FREE::1C19).

The main interaction (U8P_ANCTONES::0116) orchestrates the multi-stage encounter: it gates first-time vs repeat visit behavior using global flags (ancientOnesMet, getPowerAO, gotObTip), sets/clears a startedConvo guard, plays encounter music, freezes the Avatar (stasis), creates temporary visual NPC/items (Item::create + Item::pop), makes those items 'speak' lines (Item::bark), spawns animation/movement helper processes (METHOD::091C and multiple U8P_ANCTONES::xxxx spawned helpers), awards or withholds an artifact under flag conditions, destroys temporary items, and restores Avatar control.

U8P_ANCTONES::leaveFastArea (Event 10) is a small cleanup handler invoked when the actor leaves the trigger area: it sets info/process-exclude for the leaving actor and calls external FREE::2A56 to finalize cleanup.
notable_control_flow: hatch scan -> branch: a short loop sets a local flag (BP-01h). If the scan indicates the right condition and global startedConvo is clear, hatch spawns U8P_ANCTONES::0116; otherwise hatch spawns cleanup (FREE::1C19) and suspends.
U8P_ANCTONES::0116 sets startedConvo=1 at start and clears it when the scripted sequence finishes; ancientOnesMet is set on the first meeting to switch subsequent visits into a repeat branch.

During the interaction the Avatar is placed into stasis (setAvatarInStasis(1)), temporary items are created/popped and made to bark, then destroyed; many helper processes are spawned and run concurrently to produce animation/effects.
leaveFastArea is a defensive cleanup path to remove processing info and free any per-trigger resources via FREE::2A56.
open_questions: What exact token/item criteria does the hatch scan loop (BP-01h) look for to permit the conversation branch? The scan's matching condition is inferred but not explicit.
What is the exact semantic meaning of the 'info' id (0x210 referenced by set-info) applied to the trigger actor/item?
What precise game effect does getPowerAO represent (granting a power, gating an artifact, or another progression flag)? Its use is inferred from context but not concretely labeled.
Which exact U8P_ANCTONES::xxxx helper processes are spawned by U8P_ANCTONES::0116 and what distinct visual/animation each implements?

main_function.name: U8P_ANCTONES::hatch (Event 7)
main_function.purpose: Entry trigger run when an actor enters the Ancient Ones' fast/trigger area. Prepares actor context (set info/process-exclude), scans nearby items/tokens to decide whether to launch the Ancient Ones' interaction (U8P_ANCTONES::0116) or to schedule a cleanup (FREE::1C19), and prevents reentrancy via startedConvo checks.
entry_conditions: Actor entering the Ancient Ones' fast/trigger area (enterFastArea semantics).
Invoked with a trigger item/actor handle passed at BP+06h (indirect 02h usage).

function_map.name: U8P_ANCTONES::hatch (Event 7)
function_map.role: Trigger entry that decides whether to start the Ancient Ones encounter or do a cleanup

function_map.name: U8P_ANCTONES::leaveFastArea (Event 10)
function_map.role: Cleanup when the actor leaves the area; removes processing info and calls FREE::2A56

function_map.name: U8P_ANCTONES::0116
function_map.role: Primary interaction/dialog process: controls music, stasis, temporary manifests, dialog barks, spawned visual/animation sub-processes, and conditional reward giving

function_map.name: Item::create
function_map.role: Create temporary visual/manifestation items used in the encounter

function_map.name: Item::pop
function_map.role: Place created items in the world at computed X,Y,Z positions

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Make an item/NPC display or speak a dialog line to a process/player

function_map.name: U8P_ANCTONES::setAvatarInStasis
function_map.role: Freeze/unfreeze player control during scripted sequence

function_map.name: Item::getX/Item::getY/Item::getZ
function_map.role: Read coordinates used to place/spawn temporary objects and schedule effects

function_map.name: Item::getDirToItem
function_map.role: Compute direction between items used to orient spawned movement/animation processes

function_map.name: METHOD::091C (spawned)
function_map.role: Spawned movement/animation helper taking direction and an item pointer

function_map.name: FREE::1C19 (spawned)
function_map.role: Spawned cleanup/free routine used by hatch when conversation branch does not run

function_map.name: FREE::1C6D (spawned)
function_map.role: Spawned helper, likely a timed/delay cleanup at coordinates

function_map.name: U8P_ANCTONES::(many spawned ANCTONES::xxxx)
function_map.role: Multiple short spawned sub-behaviors/animations invoked by U8P_ANCTONES::0116 for visuals/audio

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn the primary Ancient Ones interaction/dialog process when scan conditions and startedConvo guard permit
Spawn multiple internal animation/visual helper processes to run concurrently during the encounter

external_calls.purpose: Spawned cleanup/free routine used when conversation is not started
Finalize cleanup when actor leaves trigger area
Start encounter music at the beginning of the interaction
Freeze and later unfreeze Avatar control for the scripted sequence
Create temporary visual/NPC items used to deliver dialog and effects
Place created items into the world at computed coordinates
Have created items speak dialog lines to the player/process
Remove temporary items after their dialog/effect completes
Compute orientation and spawn movement/animation helper to orient visual elements toward the trigger
Spawned helper likely used for timed effects/cleanup at given coordinates

reads.name: ancientOnesMet
reads.likely_effect: Used to detect first-time meeting vs repeat visit and select dialog/behavior branch

reads.name: getPowerAO
reads.likely_effect: Gates an alternate branch related to awarding/denying a power or artifact during the encounter

reads.name: gotObTip
reads.likely_effect: Indicates whether the player already has the obelisk tip; used to avoid giving duplicate rewards or to choose dialog

reads.name: doneDefault
reads.likely_effect: Used in combination with gotObTip to prevent repeating certain default content

reads.name: startedConvo
reads.likely_effect: Reentrancy guard: prevents starting the conversation if one is already in progress

writes.name: startedConvo
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 at the start of U8P_ANCTONES::0116 to mark an active conversation and cleared when finished; prevents duplicate/concurrent runs

writes.name: ancientOnesMet
writes.likely_effect: Set on the first meeting to ensure future visits use the repeat branch

writes.name: getPowerAO
writes.likely_effect: Set in some branches to record that the player has become eligible for or received a power/artifact (inferred)

writes.name: gotObTip
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player receives the obelisk tip/Blackrock artifact to prevent re-awarding (inferred)

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_ANCTONES::hatch (Event 7) is a trigger that runs when an actor (typically the Avatar) enters the Ancient Ones' fast/trigger area. It marks the triggering actor with script info/process-exclude, scans nearby tokens/items to decide whether the encounter should proceed, and then either launches the main Ancient Ones interaction (U8P_ANCTONES::0116) or schedules a cleanup (external FREE::1C19).
